_comment: Tool registry for choose_tools.py. Tools = Claude Code built-ins + local scripts. Tags drive keyword matching.
_schema: { id, type, short, tags[], spawn_script?, when, note? }

Read.when: Read a specific file or section — prefer offset+limit over full read

Edit.short: Exact string replacement in existing files (<5 lines — use sed instead)
Edit.when: Modify an existing file — exact string match required

Write.short: Write or overwrite a file entirely
Write.when: Create a new file or fully rewrite — use Edit for partial changes

Bash.when: Shell commands, grep, find, git, python scripts — always pipe output filter

Agent.short: Spawn sub-agent for isolated Cycle or Explore tasks
Agent.when: ≥5 tool calls expected OR independent parallel sections — max depth 1

lookup_py.short: T0 oracle: file + symbol + session index search before any grep or Read
lookup_py.when: T0 — ALWAYS run before grep or Read — returns file+line+read_hint+keywords+sessions
lookup_py.note: High score = already exists — prevents duplicate scaffolding

symbol_indexer_py.short: Refresh line numbers in knowledge/index_variables.json after symbol changes
symbol_indexer_py.when: After any symbol rename, add, or delete — run to keep index accurate

session_indexer_py.when: After session close — update session search index

token_estimator_py.short: Estimate token count for a text string
token_estimator_py.when: Before large file reads or long operations — estimate cost first

choose_tools_py.short: Keyword search across skill-manifest + tool-manifest — returns top-N matches
choose_tools_py.when: When intent is unclear — call before loading skill-manifest manually

backlink_analyzer.short: Compute topic-graph related[] links from topic overlap in index_files.json
backlink_analyzer.when: After adding/editing files in index_files.json — refreshes related[] based on shared topics
